name: Flow Test - Hotel Booking
description: Consolidated example demonstrating all ABL flow patterns: FLOW steps, GATHER, CONSTRAINTS, SET, CLEAR, CALL WITH/AS, ON_INPUT, ON_RESULT, ON_SUCCESS/ON_FAIL, TRANSFORM, DIGRESSIONS, SUB_INTENTS, CORRECTIONS, DELEGATE, STORE, FORMATS, VOICE

Hotel_Booking.description: Full-featured hotel booking agent demonstrating all flow patterns including navigation, constraints, delegation, digressions, and multi-format output
